Read the full reviewer instructions at `.github/skills/kt-idiomatic-reviewer/SKILL.md` and follow the review workflow described there.

Review the Kotlin code the user provides or has open in the editor. Produce a structured review covering:
- A) Kotlin idiomer
- B) Lesbarhet / clean code
- C) Coroutines & suspend correctness
- D) Null safety

Output format (from SKILL.md):
1. Idiomatic level score (X/10)
2. Kort liste med forbedringer
3. Inline-kommentarer (PR-style, maks 10)
4. Refaktorert kode – før → etter (maks 5)
